name: io.github.anish632/ground-truth
title: Ground Truth - 15-Second Activation Test
description: Prove MCP connection in 15 seconds: copy config, paste prompt 'Use Ground Truth check_endpoint with url=https://example.com'. No signup, no API key, free forever. Paid plans for automated monitors, change alerts, and team features.

headers.name: X-API-Key
headers.description: NOT NEEDED FOR ACTIVATION. First prove it works: use check_endpoint with url=https://example.com with NO API key. Only add X-API-Key after successful activation for team features: saved monitors, scheduled checks, evidence history, and change reports.
